title: analyzer-default plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the analyzer-default semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_MAJOR_PATTERNS.description: Comma-separated regular expressions that trigger a major version bump.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_MINOR_PATTERNS.description: Comma-separated regular expressions that trigger a minor version bump.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_PATCH_PATTERNS.description: Comma-separated regular expressions that trigger a patch version bump.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_MAJOR_PATTERN.description: Backward-compatible singular major bump regexp. Prefer SEMREL_PLUGIN_MAJOR_PATTERNS.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_MINOR_PATTERN.description: Backward-compatible singular minor bump regexp. Prefer SEMREL_PLUGIN_MINOR_PATTERNS.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_PATCH_PATTERN.description: Backward-compatible singular patch bump regexp. Prefer SEMREL_PLUGIN_PATCH_PATTERNS.

SEMREL_COMMITS.description: JSON-encoded array of raw commit message strings since the last release tag. Populated automatically by semrel core.
